[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110000 3
1 0100010 2
2 0000101 2
3 0001011 3
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0000001 1
7 1000100 2

01 10 0000000 a match 4 5
12 21 0011000 2
23 32 0000001 1 match 6
34 43 1100000 2
45 54 0100000 1
56 65 0000000 a match 4 5
67 76 0000001 1 match 6
70 07 0000001 1 match 6

02 20 0000001 1 match 6
13 31 1000100 2 match 7
24 42 0010000 1
35 53 0100000 1
46 64 0000000 a match 4 5
57 75 0000010 1
60 06 0000001 1 match 6
71 17 0001000 1

03 30 0100001 2
14 41 1010000 2
25 52 0000010 1
36 63 0000101 2 match 2
47 74 0000000 a match 4 5
50 05 0100000 1
61 16 0000100 1
72 27 0001011 3 match 3

04 40 0100000 1
15 51 0000000 a match 4 5
26 62 0000001 1 match 6
37 73 0000001 1 match 6
